Rule builder UX.question: Where should the conditional logic controls live?
Rule builder UX.answer: Section in expanded editor — collapsible section inside existing field accordion

Rule builder UX.question: Which comparison operators?
Rule builder UX.answer: Basic set — equals, not equals, is one of, is not one of

Rule builder UX.question: How to select trigger field?
Rule builder UX.answer: Dropdown of fields on earlier pages/above only — prevents circular dependencies

Rule builder UX.question: Visual indicator on conditional fields?
Rule builder UX.answer: Badge + tooltip — small icon with rule summary on hover
